title: Opening for Category Manager at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Urban Ladder Advisory Limited:
Urban Ladder Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder Advisory Limited!
